## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New / updated stack agent
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
